reviews.review_title: A good fun game needing visual upgrades
reviews.review_description: I love the idea and it’s fun playing and shooting catapult stones at each other while trying to dodge. But I think the graphics can be a lot better than is presented . It would make a huge difference in the fun experience. Otherwise pretty good

Update:

Thanks for the reply Rodolphe!

I’ll update my review after the game has been updated.

Original Review:

First the Bad

It’s blurry which was a shock considering how simple the graphics are.  It’s like the graphics were scaled up from the cell phone game and smoothed. I hope the developers redo the graphics in high resolution.  This art style would look so much better clear and crisp.

The menu system is a bit clunky.

The background music is just short loops.

The stages are too big for 1 v 1.  I think they’re best suited for the max of 3 v 3.

No voice chat.

Now the Good

The controls work well.

I love the style, and the repetitive music loops, unusual rail locomotion, and weird stages quickly started to grow on me.  It’s like being inside a mechanical shooting gallery where you’re a target sliding back and forth.

No voice chat. This will be bad for playing with friends, possibly a good thing when playing with random people. 😁

developer_response.body:
Hello Jioxx

Thanks for the feedback, we will continue to improve the game and make it as enjoyable as possible.
Regarding the voice chat, if you invite friends and make a group together via the social menu of the game, you will be able to use the voice chat. We have implemented this option to avoid ruining the game experience in case of disrespectful random people.

Have a good game!

Rodolphe

reviews.review_description:
A great surprise. Colorfull, easy to play and fun. Thanks to the tutorial to understand the special moving system.
The good choice of my week.

We tested the game with friends and we had a good laugh. The game is easy to use and we can directly have fun shooting rocks with our slingshot. Graphically the game is different from what we can find usually and it's a pleasure.
